meaning: adj.使徒保罗的n.(伦敦)圣保罗学校的学生(或毕业生) Pauline 波林(女子名)
examples: Pauline wore a silk dress with a strand of pearls.
I 'd like to speak to Pauline, please.

Subsequently, the NASP program has encountered the bureaucratic equivalent of the perils of Pauline.
Pauline Frommer, creator of the Pauline Frommer Guidebooks, has two kids, ages 6 and 10.
